questions.question: What is the recommended incremental migration path from Nuxt 2 to Nuxt 3?
options: Rewrite the entire app from scratch in a new repository
Upgrade the nuxt package directly to v3 and fix errors
Use a code-mod CLI to convert all files automatically

questions.question: In Nuxt 3, what replaces the context object parameter in asyncData?
options: A $context global available in all components
Separate composables like useRoute, useFetch, navigateTo
Props passed automatically to page components

questions.question: Which Nuxt 2 library has NO official Nuxt 3 version according to the migration docs?
